_readme: nyan Real 3DoF user device table example.
Copy this file to <OBS config>/plugin_config/obs-nyan-real-3dof/devices.json
(on Windows: %AppData%/obs-studio/plugin_config/obs-nyan-real-3dof/devices.json)
and edit the entries. Entries are matched before the built-in table, so you
can both add new devices and override built-in profiles. OBS restart required.
Fields:
name             display name shown in the dock (optional)
vid, pid         USB IDs as hex strings ('3318' or '0x3318'). pid '*' or
'any' matches every PID of the VID; combine with
product_contains to avoid matching unrelated devices.
transport        'one_bridge_tcp' (XREAL One family TCP bridge),
'air_hid' (XREAL Air family HID reports),
'rayneo_hid' (RayNeo Air family HID reports) or
'sensor_api' (Windows Sensor API, e.g. EPSON MOVERIO)
mount            IMU mount rotation around X. Either a preset name:
'rayneo' (-20), or a number of degrees.
fov_deg          diagonal display FOV in degrees (optional, default 50)
product_contains only match when the HID product string contains this
text, case-insensitive (optional)
display_width,   native display resolution; used as the virtual-screen
display_height   render resolution while the glasses display is not
connected (optional, default 1920x1080)
edid_vendor      3-letter EDID PNP id of the glasses' display panel,
e.g. 'MRG' for XREAL, 'TCL' for RayNeo (optional)
edid_product     EDID product code as hex ('3134' or '0x3134'); 0 or
omitted matches every product of the vendor (optional)
edid_name_contains  EDID monitor-name fragment, case-insensitive,
e.g. 'SmartGlasses' (optional)
The EDID fields identify the glasses' display for the Display Wall
auto-exclusion and the dock's fullscreen-projector button; built-in ids
already cover XREAL (MRG) and RayNeo Air (TCL 03D4 / SmartGlasses).
The example below shows a hypothetical new Air-protocol device: copy the
entry, replace the pid, and it will stream like an Air / Air 2.
